cardSource.name: Card source
cardSource.desc: Choose how to find flashcards for review: by tag or by folder location

folderName.name: Folder name
folderName.desc: Choose the folder path to use

isBlurFlashcardText.name: Blur flashcard text
isBlurFlashcardText.desc: Blur flashcard content in review list until mouse hover

openInPreviewMode.name: Open cards in reading mode
openInPreviewMode.desc: Open flashcards from review list in reading mode (preview). Important: enabling this setting is required for review buttons to appear on cards.

cloudIdentity.heading: MemMaster Cloud
cloudIdentity.desc: Connect without an account. A recovery key lets you connect this vault on another device.
cloudIdentity.calloutTitle: Tests and reminders in the cloud
cloudIdentity.calloutBody: MemMaster Cloud helps you create tests from your review cards and take them later. You can also enable browser push notifications to get reminders when cards are ready to review.
cloudIdentity.statusCheckingDesc: MemMaster is verifying the recovery key with the server.
cloudIdentity.statusConnectedDesc: Cloud features are ready. Connection created: {{date}}.
cloudIdentity.statusMissingDesc: Create a new connection to use cloud features.
cloudIdentity.statusNotFoundDesc: The saved key no longer works. Create a new connection or enter another recovery key.
cloudIdentity.statusInvalidDesc: Create a new connection or enter a valid recovery key.
cloudIdentity.statusUnavailableDesc: Your connection has not changed. Try the check again later.
cloudIdentity.copyBackupKeyDesc: Keep this key private. Anyone with this key can access your MemMaster cloud data.
cloudIdentity.importBackupKeyDesc: Use a recovery key from another device to work with the same cloud data.
cloudIdentity.importModalDesc: Paste your MemMaster recovery key. After verification, this vault will use the cloud data linked to that key.
cloudIdentity.createModalDesc: A new recovery key will be saved for this vault. The previous connection remains accessible only if you saved its key.

settings.hotkeysDesc: Configure keyboard shortcuts for quick card review. Set hotkeys in Settings > Hotkeys > MemMaster.

reviewFlashcard.lengthWarning: This note is {{count}}/{{limit}} characters. Shorter notes work better for review.
reviewFlashcard.completedReviewAction: This card is completed. Clear metadata to review it again.

reviewList.noSearchResults: No flashcards found matching your search.

notices.notAFlashcard: This document is not a flashcard
notices.alreadyFlashcard: This document is already a flashcard
notices.cardReset: Metadata cleared. This card can be reviewed again.
notices.backupKeyNotFound: No connection was found for this key
notices.connectionCreationFailed: Could not create a MemMaster connection.
notices.connectionSaveFailed: Could not save the connection in settings.
notices.cloudUnavailable: MemMaster cloud is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
notices.cloudNetworkError: Could not connect to MemMaster cloud.
